consts:
Build seg_targets.bin via class-split peel + higher-order AC residual (+tr neighbour).

Variant of encode_seg_c2split_purepy.py that extends the spatial context with the
top-right neighbour (y-1, x+1) — causal under raster scan. This adds one dimension
to the CDF tables:

  - frame 0: P(sym | top, left, tl, tr)           — Markov-4 spatial,  5000 B raw CDF
  - frames 1+: P(sym | top, left, tl, tr, prev)    — Markov-5 temporal, 25000 B raw CDF

v2 DEFLATE-aware scoping (2026-04-17) measured that the +24 KB raw CDF growth only
costs ~+1.7 KB in archive.zip because the expanded tables have huge near-uniform
regions after Laplace smoothing. Entropy savings on the 59.6M-symbol residual were
projected at -17.5 KB (model-level) and the net ship-layer delta is -19.6 KB.

On-disk format: IDENTICAL to the original c2split format except the two CDF
tables have new shapes:

    uint16 n_pairs, uint16 H, uint16 W
    uint8  precision
    uint8  peel_class
    uint8  mask_format
    uint32 mask_payload_len
    <mask_payload bytes>
    uint16 spatial_size_bytes   # 2 * 5**4 * 4 = 5000
    uint16 temporal_size_bytes  # 2 * 5**5 * 4 = 25000
    spatial freqs  : uint16[5,5,5,5,4]     P(remapped_target | top,left,tl,tr)  frame 0
    temporal freqs : uint16[5,5,5,5,5,4]   P(remapped_target | top,left,tl,tr,prev) frames 1+
    uint32 bitstream_length
    <bitstream bytes>

Decoder (seg_c2split_tr_codec.py, sibling) MUST match exactly.

Usage:
    python encode_seg_c2split_tr_purepy.py --src seg_targets.bin --peel 4 --roundtrip

  1           2 LOAD_CONST               0 ('Build seg_targets.bin via class-split peel + higher-order AC residual (+tr neighbour).\n\nVariant of encode_seg_c2split_purepy.py that extends the spatial context with the\ntop-right neighbour (y-1, x+1) — causal under raster scan. This adds one dimension\nto the CDF tables:\n\n  - frame 0: P(sym | top, left, tl, tr)           — Markov-4 spatial,  5000 B raw CDF\n  - frames 1+: P(sym | top, left, tl, tr, prev)    — Markov-5 temporal, 25000 B raw CDF\n\nv2 DEFLATE-aware scoping (2026-04-17) measured that the +24 KB raw CDF growth only\ncosts ~+1.7 KB in archive.zip because the expanded tables have huge near-uniform\nregions after Laplace smoothing. Entropy savings on the 59.6M-symbol residual were\nprojected at -17.5 KB (model-level) and the net ship-layer delta is -19.6 KB.\n\nOn-disk format: IDENTICAL to the original c2split format except the two CDF\ntables have new shapes:\n\n    uint16 n_pairs, uint16 H, uint16 W\n    uint8  precision\n    uint8  peel_class\n    uint8  mask_format\n    uint32 mask_payload_len\n    <mask_payload bytes>\n    uint16 spatial_size_bytes   # 2 * 5**4 * 4 = 5000\n    uint16 temporal_size_bytes  # 2 * 5**5 * 4 = 25000\n    spatial freqs  : uint16[5,5,5,5,4]     P(remapped_target | top,left,tl,tr)  frame 0\n    temporal freqs : uint16[5,5,5,5,5,4]   P(remapped_target | top,left,tl,tr,prev) frames 1+\n    uint32 bitstream_length\n    <bitstream bytes>\n\nDecoder (seg_c2split_tr_codec.py, sibling) MUST match exactly.\n\nUsage:\n    python encode_seg_c2split_tr_purepy.py --src seg_targets.bin --peel 4 --roundtrip\n')
